question: I was going through our previous conversation about high-end fashion brands, and I was wondering if you could remind me of the brand that uses wild rubber sourced from the Amazon rainforest?

retrieval_results.context:
User is requesting recommendations for high-end fashion brands that prioritize sustainability, expressing interest in eco-friendly, ethically produced luxury apparel.
User is curious about how high-end fashion brands differ from fast fashion and why high-end brands are more expensive, seeking to understand the distinctions and pricing factors.
User wants to know if sustainable high-end brands offer sales or discounts, looking for opportunities to purchase such items at reduced prices.
User is evaluating whether investing in high-end fashion brands is worthwhile, weighing budget considerations against the appeal of durable, unique designs and brand prestige.
User plans to shop secondhand for sustainable, high-quality fashion while staying mindful of spending, aiming to balance environmental responsibility with budget constraints.
